title: Chinese carmaker patents voice-controlled 'in-vehicle toilet'
summary: Chinese automaker Seres patents a voice-controlled in-vehicle toilet as carmakers accelerate innovation to compete in the fiercely contested electric vehicle market.
content: Seres' plans show how stiff competition in the EV space is putting pressure on carmakers to innovate.

zh.title: 中国汽车制造商申请语音控制"车内厕所"专利
zh.summary: 中国汽车制造商赛力斯为语音控制的车内厕所申请专利，随着汽车制造商加速创新以在竞争激烈的电动汽车市场中竞争。

title: Finance ministers and top bankers raise serious concerns about Mythos AI model
summary: Finance officials and bankers express concern that the Mythos AI model poses unprecedented cybersecurity risks due to its ability to identify and exploit system vulnerabilities.
content: Experts say Mythos potentially has an unprecedented ability to identify and exploit cybersecurity weaknesses.

zh.title: 财政部长和顶级银行家对Mythos AI模型提出严重关切
zh.summary: 金融官员和银行家表示担忧，Mythos AI模型因其识别和利用系统漏洞的能力而带来前所未有的网络安全风险。

title: Oil falls as Trump reiterates Iran war ‘should’ end soon and Israel-Lebanon truce lifts hopes
summary: Oil prices fell after Trump signaled support for ending the Iran war and following a 10-day ceasefire agreement between Israel and Lebanon.
content: Oil prices fell after Donald Trump said Israel and Lebanon had agreed to a 10-day ceasefire following talks in Washington.

zh.title: 特朗普重申伊朗战争"应该"尽快结束，以色列-黎巴嫩停火协议提振希望，油价下跌
zh.summary: 特朗普表示支持结束伊朗战争，以色列和黎巴嫩达成10天停火协议后，油价下跌。

title: Former Treasury Secretary Henry Paulson warns U.S. needs an emergency ‘break-the-glass’ plan if Treasury demand collapses
summary: Former Treasury Secretary Paulson urges policymakers to develop contingency plans for a potential Treasury market crisis that could trigger severe economic consequences.
content: Former Treasury Secretary Henry Paulson on Thursday urged U.S. policymakers to prepare an emergency plan in case demand for Treasurys breaks down — warning that a crisis in the government bond market could trigger severe consequences across the economy.

zh.title: 前财政部长保尔森警告美国需要应对国债需求崩溃的紧急"破玻璃"计划
zh.summary: 前财政部长保尔森敦促政策制定者制定应急预案，应对可能引发严重经济后果的国债市场危机。

title: Asia markets mostly fall as fragile Middle East ceasefire tempers sentiment
summary: Asia-Pacific markets declined as the fragile Israel-Lebanon ceasefire dampened investor risk appetite, though U.S. stocks set fresh records.
content: Most Asia-Pacific markets traded lower Friday as an Israel-Lebanon ceasefire tempered risk appetite, even after Wall Street closed at fresh record highs.

zh.title: 亚洲市场因脆弱的中东停火协议降温而多数下跌
zh.summary: 由于以色列-黎巴嫩脆弱停火协议削弱了投资者的风险偏好，亚太地区市场下跌，但美国股市创历史新高。

title: IMF, World Bank say they are resuming dealings with Venezuela
summary: The IMF and World Bank announced they are resuming financial dealings with Venezuela after suspending relations since 2019.
content: The International Monetary Fund and the World Bank on Thursday each said they had resumed dealings with Venezuela, which had been paused since 2019.

zh.title: 国际货币基金组织和世界银行表示正恢复与委内瑞拉的关系
zh.summary: 国际货币基金组织和世界银行宣布在暂停2019年以来的关系后，正恢复与委内瑞拉的金融往来。

title: Trump says war in Iran is going 'swimmingly' and 'should be ending pretty soon'
summary: Trump predicted the Iran war would end soon, following Israel's ceasefire announcement with Lebanon. This reflects ongoing Middle East tensions and Trump's optimistic stance on military engagement.
content: President Donald Trump's latest prediction on the end of the war against Iran came hours after Israel announced a ceasefire with Lebanon.

zh.title: 特朗普表示伊朗战争进展"顺利"且"应该很快就会结束"
zh.summary: 特朗普预测伊朗战争即将结束，这是在以色列宣布与黎巴嫩停火后提出的。这反映了中东地区持续的紧张局势和特朗普对军事行动的乐观态度。
